gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/29)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/29)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ الَّذِي إِذَا دَعَاهُ أَبُوهُ لَعَنَ أَبَاهُ وَ الَّذِي إِذَا أَجَابَهُ ابْنُهُ يَضْرِبُهُ .

en.hubeali: Aban, from Ziyad Al Kunasy who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘And the one who, when his father calls him, curses his father, and the one who, when his son answers him, strikes him (is one and the same)’.
en.sarwar: 15. Aban has narrated from Ziyad al-Kanasi who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘A son who condemns his father when he calls him and the father who beats up his son who responds to the father’s call are the same.’”
